text:
Secrets Video Rental レンタル秘密ビデオ店 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. 
__NOTOC__

Summary

Secrets Video Rental レンタル秘密ビデオ店 - This card allows the caster to rent out a video containing various secrets about a target person of their choice. This is provided under the condition that you don't show or discuss the video's contents with anyone.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.058 :: レンタル秘密ビデオ店 
他人の秘密を見ることが出来るビデオ店。入会条件は借りたビデオを誰にも見せない、内容を話さないこと。
|-
![Eng]
|No.058 :: Secrets Video Rental 
A video store where you can see the secrets of others. It is not for anyone else to see the movies borrowed. Admission conditions are also not to speak of the contents.
|}
